title: Interior & Exterior Detail
shortDescription: A thorough clean inside and out — the essential reset your car deserves.
steps: Pre-rinse and foam bath to lift surface grime
Two-bucket hand wash — safe on all paint types
Wheel and tyre clean including brake dust removal
Door jambs, seals and rubber trim detail
Exterior glass clean (streak-free finish)
Tyre dressing applied
Interior vacuum — seats, carpets, boot
Dash, console and trim wipe-down with UV protectant
Interior glass clean
Leather or fabric seat wipe and condition (where applicable)
Air freshener finish
whoFor: Regular maintenance — keep your car in shape year-round
Pre-sale preparation — first impressions sell cars
Post-purchase refresh — start fresh with your new car
After a road trip or tough season
note: Price varies by vehicle size. SUVs, vans and large 4WDs priced on inspection.

title: Paint Rejuvenation / Cut & Polish
shortDescription: Machine polishing that restores your paint's true depth and gloss.
steps: Full exterior wash and decontamination
Clay bar treatment to remove bonded surface contamination
Machine polish — stage selected based on paint condition
Swirl marks, light scratches and oxidation removed
Panel wipe-down with IPA to reveal true correction result
Paint sealant or carnauba wax applied to finish and protect
whoFor: Cars with swirl marks and light scratches from automatic washes
Older paint that has dulled or oxidised
Anyone preparing for a ceramic coating (required as a first step)
Enthusiasts who want their paint looking its absolute best
note: Sebastian's favourite service — most cars benefit from this more than they realise. Price depends on paint condition and vehicle size.
sebastianNote: This is the service I recommend for most cars. You'd be surprised what a proper machine polish can uncover underneath years of wash scratches and oxidation.

title: Ceramic Coating
shortDescription: A permanent chemical protection layer — gloss, slickness, and lasting defence.
steps: Full exterior wash and decontamination
Clay bar treatment
Full machine polish (paint rejuvenation included as standard)
Panel wipe-down with IPA for a contamination-free surface
Ceramic coating applied panel by panel
Curing time observed — car kept dry for 24–48 hours post application
Final inspection and detail
whoFor: New car owners who want to protect their investment from day one
Enthusiasts who want maximum gloss and the easiest wash routine
Anyone tired of waxing every few months
Cars that have already been corrected and need long-term protection
note: Ceramic coating always includes a full paint rejuvenation. Price depends on vehicle size, condition, and coating selected. Contact us to discuss options.
sebastianNote: This is the top of the range — a proper coating lasts years, not weeks. I only apply coatings to paint that has been correctly prepared.
